query:
SELECT dataSource, supplierName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as total_cost
FROM services
WHERE dataSource LIKE '%Xero%'
GROUP BY dataSource, supplierName
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
SELECT dataSource, supplierName, COUNT(*) as cnt, SUM(monthlyCost) as total_cost
FROM services

GROUP BY dataSource, supplierName
ORDER BY cnt DESC;
